description: Optimize get_all_strategies to fetch all data at once instead of metadata only, avoiding a potential N+1 query pattern.
rationale: Currently, get_all_strategies fetches only metadatas. The ChromaDB client might be configured to lazy-load documents, leading to a separate query for each document's content when it's accessed later. Fetching all data upfront avoids this N+1 pattern, especially when the number of strategies grows.
